'''Vaila Pecivas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who was in office until [[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]]. Her tenure was noted for a particular lack of style.<ref name="Darth Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

At one point in her Chancellorship, Pecivas appointed [[Jideon Praji]] as [[Minister of Finance (Republic)|Minister of Finance]]. However, since Praji was also [[Bank of the Core Executive Board Chair|Executive Chair]] of the [[Bank of the Core/Legends|Bank of the Core]], the appointment was seen to create a conflict of interest, and both [[holomedia]] criticism and a [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] inquiry forced him to step down after just days in the post.<ref name="Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji" />

During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], in order to boost patriotism and historical recognition, [[Biscuit Baron]] released commemorative holocubes of Pecivas in their [[QuickSnack]] and [[QuickSnackLite]] bundles.
